intro: Bouteloua triathera, also known as silver grama or silver grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as potential antioxidant and antiviral effects. The bioactive constituents of Bouteloua triathera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Bouteloua triathera is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is used to treat various conditions, including skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues.
